“The rhythm of Hebrew poetry is not the measured beat of the earth-locked body. It is the majestic rhythm of the soaring spirit, felt only by him who has the music of heaven in his soul. matches.lb: Commentary: The Torah; A Women's Commentary, Genesis 21:16:1
matches.x: “Let me not see the child’s death.” The scene is heartrending. Watching one’s child die must be horrible; what might be worse is leaving one’s child to die alone.
